business.title: China rides out Iran war oil shock on back of ‘teapot’ refineries - at least for now
business.description: As the war in Iran enters its second month and Brent crude surges past $100 a barrel, China has largely managed to shield its economy from a massive disruption due to the oil crisis. One of the biggest reasons of this insulation is its network of small, independent "teapot" refineries in Shandong province.

business.description: The 22,900-23,000 zone remains a key resistance band for the Nifty 50 next week, however, a decisive break below 22,350 would indicate a continuation of the downtrend, potentially dragging the index towards 22,200 and even 22,000, making this a crucial make-or-break zone in the near term, said Sudeep Shah of SBI Securities.

business.title: HDFC Bank Q4 update: Advances rise 12% YoY, deposits grow 15.5%
business.description: The bank’s average advances under management stood at ₹29.64 lakh crore for the March 2026 quarter, up 10% from ₹26.95 lakh crore a year earlier. Period-end advances under management were approximately ₹30.57 lakh crore, marking a 10.2% rise year-on-year.

science.title: Meteor impacts may have sparked life on Earth, scientists say
science.description: Asteroid impacts may have helped kick-start life on Earth by creating hot, chemical-rich environments ideal for early biology. These impact-generated hydrothermal systems could have lasted thousands of years—long enough for life’s building blocks to form. Scientists now think these environments may have been common on early Earth, making them a strong candidate for where life began. The idea could also guide the search for life on other worlds.

ai.title: Innovative Solutions Unveiled at HDB-AWS Fintech Ideathon
ai.description: HDB Financial Services, in partnership with AWS, hosted the HDB-AWS Ideathon, gathering fintech innovators to tackle challenges in lending, risk management, and operational efficiency. The event saw 38 participants develop production-ready solutions, aiming to transform India's financial services sector. Noventiq's Agentic AI won, with Nugget by Zomato and Ganit Business Solutions as runners-up.
